"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\sc3u_headless.dir/objects.a
C:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\sc3u_headless.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\sc3u_headless.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -shared -o bin\libsc3u_headless.dll -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libsc3u_headless.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\sc3u_headless.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\sc3u_headless.dir\linkLibs.rsp
